title: Mrs. Temple's Telegram
writer: Frank Wyatt, William Morris, Elmer Harris
actors: Bryant Washburn, Wanda Hawley, Carmen Phillips
plot: Jack Temple adores his wife, but she remains extremely jealous of him. At an ice-cream parlor, Jack is attracted to a flirtatious vamp and meets her again later on a department store's roof garden. They linger so long that the sto...
